transcript: We keep seeing their eyeballs, glued to us on the sidewalk But that look could kill They are trying so hard to find all the weaknesses inside But it's gonna spill Oh, can we take a minute, turn and face the critics Let's put flowers in our hair like we don't care And dance the village clown moves Nobody's stopping our groove That's good, it's just you and me And making me clap with your moves Ain't no stopping our groove That's around, it's just you and me Oh, you and me are a vibe, girl Disco some fun like one of a kind, girl Till morning's here When opinions start to guide us We won't let them define us We'll play it by ear And I know we're too shy But we can clown around tonight You know the circus leaves clown when it's time And dance until it's clown Nobody's stopping, I groove That's good, it's just you and me And making me laugh with your moves Ain't no stopping, I groove That's good, it's just you
